name: Dallas Valley Goldmine - Fort Worth
description_short: Dallas Valley Goldmine is a precious metals buyer operating 12 locations across Texas that purchases gold, silver, coins, and jewelry through private, appointment-only consultations.
description_long:
Dallas Valley Goldmine operates as a specialized precious metals and jewelry buyer with 12 locations throughout the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex and surrounding Texas cities. The company focuses exclusively on buying—not lending—gold, silver, coins, platinum, and diamonds from individual clients. Their business model centers on appointment-based transactions conducted in professional office settings rather than retail storefronts, emphasizing privacy and security throughout the selling process. The company has built its reputation on personalized service, with founder Bret reportedly handling consultations directly and providing detailed market-based pricing for precious metals and estate jewelry.

Dallas Valley Goldmine purchases a wide range of items including estate jewelry (necklaces, rings, bracelets, earrings), gold and silver coins, dental gold and crowns, sterling silverware and tea sets, and platinum items with diamonds. They accept both large collections and single items, explicitly marketing their willingness to buy "a lot or have a little." The company operates strictly by appointment, requiring customers to call (972)523-5442 to schedule private consultations at any of their 12 Texas locations. They offer a special concierge program for individuals over 60 or disabled customers.

What distinguishes Dallas Valley Goldmine is their emphasis on privacy, professional office settings in commercial buildings rather than pawn shop storefronts, and one-on-one appointments that avoid public display of valuables. Customer testimonials highlight the expertise of their staff, particularly regarding coin grading and precious metals valuation. The company maintains an A+ Better Business Bureau rating and reports a 4.9 out of 5 average customer rating. Their approach targets customers uncomfortable with traditional pawn shop environments or large retail gold buyers, positioning themselves as a secure alternative for private transactions.

However, as a precious metals buyer rather than a lender, Dallas Valley Goldmine does not provide emergency cash, loans, or credit services. Customers must own items outright and be willing to sell them to access cash; this is not a collateral-based lending option. The appointment-only model, while emphasizing privacy, may be inconvenient for customers needing immediate cash access. No information is provided about buyback guarantees, price locks, or dispute resolution procedures. The company's 12 locations, while extensive, are concentrated in the Dallas-Fort Worth area and do not serve all of Texas.
address: 1751 River Run Suite 200, Fort Worth, TX 76107

company_info.headquarters: 1751 River Run Suite 200, Fort Worth, TX 76107

pros: A+ Better Business Bureau rating with 4.9/5 average customer rating
12 convenient locations across Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex and surrounding Texas cities
Private appointment-only model ensures valuables are not displayed publicly on retail counters
Professional office building locations rather than traditional pawn shop storefronts
Special concierge program available for customers over 60 or disabled individuals
Expert appraisal and spot-market pricing for gold, silver, coins, and precious metals
One-on-one personalized consultations allowing detailed discussion of items and valuations
cons: Appointment-only model requires advance scheduling and may not accommodate same-day cash needs
No lending or collateral-based loan products available—customers must sell items outright to receive cash
No information provided about price locks, buyback guarantees, or formal dispute resolution procedures
Limited geographic service area concentrated in Texas, not available nationally
Website lacks transparent pricing guides or valuation methodologies for different precious metals
best_for: Estate liquidators and heirs selling inherited jewelry, coins, or precious metals collections
Coin and precious metals collectors with large accumulations seeking private, confidential sales
Customers uncomfortable with traditional pawn shop environments who prefer professional office settings
Seniors and disabled individuals requiring accessible, private appointment-based transaction options
diagnosis: Dallas Valley Goldmine is best for customers holding precious metals, coins, or jewelry who need to sell items for cash and prioritize privacy and professional service over convenience. The critical caveat is that this is a buyer, not a lender—customers must own items outright and be willing to sell them; there are no emergency loan products or collateral-based financing options available.
services: Estate jewelry purchasing (rings, necklaces, bracelets, earrings)
Dental gold and gold crown buying
Sterling silverware and tea set buying
Private appointment scheduling at 12 Texas locations
Special concierge program for customers over 60 or disabled
Spot-market pricing based on current precious metals values
Safe and secure transaction environment in professional buildings
